bugs.report_text: The main container content is touching the screen edges without proper spacing and is shifted horizontally out of alignment.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-100 via-blue-50 to-slate-200 flex flex-col p-6 font-sans">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-100 via-blue-50 to-slate-200 flex flex-col p-0 -px-8 font-sans">

bugs.report_text: The clickable card element does not provide visual cursor feedback to indicate it is interactive.
The modal overlay is appearing behind other page content instead of positioned on top.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-50 flex items-center justify-center z-50 p-4">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-50 flex items-center justify-center z-10 p-4">

bugs.report_text: The modal dialog is positioned far below the visible viewport, making it partially or completely invisible.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-50 flex items-center justify-center z-50 p-4">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-50 flex items-center justify-center z-50 p-4 -my-96">

bugs.report_text: The element has excessively rounded corners making it appear distorted as a thin pill shape instead of a proper box.
The brand name text is too dark and blends into the dark card background, significantly reducing readability.
bugs.neg_code: {brand.name}
bugs.pos_code: {brand.name}

bugs.report_text: The delete button is positioned far below the card and hidden behind other elements instead of appearing at the top.
bugs.neg_code: className="absolute -top-8 right-0 text-red-500 hover:text-red-700 font-bold text-sm"
bugs.pos_code: className="absolute bottom-96 left-0 text-red-500 hover:text-red-700 font-bold text-sm z-0"

bugs.report_text: The dashboard stats display with an unbalanced column layout, causing awkward spacing and content overflow at different screen sizes.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 mb-8">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-5 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-8">

bugs.report_text: The empty state message text is too light and difficult to read against the background.
The quick action buttons are stacked vertically in a single column instead of arranged in a responsive multi-column grid layout.
